channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Packers clinch playoff berth with 1st shutout in NFL this season, 34-0 over Saints
item.description: Josh Jacobs gained 107 yards from scrimmage and scored a touchdown for a sixth straight game as the Green Bay Packers clinched a playoff berth while producing the first shutout of the NFL season, 34-0 over the hapless New Orleans Saints.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How Red Sox signings could bolster SF Giants’ odds of signing Corbin Burnes
item.description: The Red Sox were reportedly finalists to sign Corbin Burnes, but they might be out of the race after signing two starting pitchers
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Houston Astros welcome 1B Christian Walker to team; say negotiations with Bregman stalled
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — The Astros welcomed first baseman Christian Walker to the team Monday, in one of two moves that almost certainly marks the end of Alex Bregman’s time in Houston.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NCAA appealing Pavia injunction as D-I board grants waiver to former JUCO players
item.description: The NCAA appealed Monday the preliminary injunction granted by a U.S. federal judge giving Diego Pavia another year of eligibility even as the organization's Division I board of directors granted a waiver allowing athletes in a similar situation as the Vanderbilt quarterback to play in 2025-26.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 Oregon and No. 8 Ohio State gear up for rematch of thriller won by Ducks
item.description: Oregon and Ohio State have already produced one heck of a game this season. Now, the top-seeded Ducks (13-0) and No. 8 Buckeyes (11-2) are gearing up for a rematch more than 10 weeks later in a College Football Playoff quarterfinal game at the Rose Bowl on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: East Bay’s Sabrina Ionescu joins Unrivaled 3-on-3 league
item.description: Sabrina Ionescu won a WNBA title and an Olympic gold medal in 2024, will join new league that will start play in January
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Washington Mystics hire Jamila Wideman as general manager, Sydney Johnson as coach
item.description: The Washington Mystics hired Jamila Wideman as the franchise's new general manager and Sydney Johnson as the team's coach on Monday. Wideman joins the Mystics after spending six years at the NBA league office, where she most recently served as senior vice president of player development.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Houston Texans wide receiver Tank Dell released from hospital after severe knee injury
item.description: It’s the second straight year Tank Dell has sustained what is almost certain to be a season-ending injury.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Cowboys coach Mike McCarthy shares jubilant embrace with owner Jerry Jones amid contract drama
item.description: Cowboys head coach Mike McCarthy and owner Jerry Jones shared a warm embrace in the locker room after a win over the Buccaneers as the final season of McCarthy's contract nears an end.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Women's volleyball star has message for NCAA after Texas AG sues org over trans inclusion in women's sports
item.description: San Jose State women's volleyball star Brooke Slusser fired off a message toward the NCAA after the Texas attorney general filed lawsuit over trans inclusion in women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GJ Tigers Grant Lewis and Will Weirath shine under varsity spotlight
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Grant Lewis and Will Weirath aren’t your average freshmen. They’re not just competing with older, more experienced players — they’re excelling. Their combined 25-point performance in the Tigers’ recent win highlights their remarkable season.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Flames get goals from 6 players in a 6-4 victory over the Blackhawks
item.description: Jonathan Huberdeau, Connor Zary, Blake Coleman, and Matt Coronato each had a goal and an assist as the Calgary Flames beat the Chicago Blackhawks 6-4 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mikheyev stars as 'Hawks beat Kraken 3-1 for 3rd straight win
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Ilya Mikheyev scored two more goals, Arvid Soderblom made 27 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Seattle Kraken 3-1 on Thursday night for their third straight win. Teuvo Teravainen had two assists as Chicago closed out a perfect three-game homestand.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bay FC Treasure Island training facility lease approved by SF mayor
item.description: (BCN) --San Francisco Mayor London Breed signed legislation on Thursday that will allow the women's professional soccer team Bay Football Club, or Bay FC, to make Treasure Island their future home with a permanent training center.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Utah HC erases two-goal deficit to stun Vancouver
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Mikhail Sergachev scored with 12 seconds left in overtime, as the Utah Hockey Club stormed back from a 2-0 deficit in the third period to beat the Vanouver Canucks and end a five-game home losing streak, 3-2.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: American competitive eater Joey Chestnut named Holiday Bowl Parade Grand Marshall
item.description: World-famous competitive eater Joey Chestnut has been chosen as the 2024 DIRECTV Holiday Bowl "Chief Eggnog Official." He will also serve as the Grand Marshal of the Holiday Bowl Parade.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: La Jolla 55, Army-Navy 47
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys hoops in La Jolla with the Vikings hosting Army-Navy from Carlsbad. Great game that went right down to the wire, La Jolla won 52-47. Vikings were lead by Leo Hawkinson with 16. Warriors were lead by Yanler Ramos game high 26 points.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: NCAA president says there are 'less than 10' transgender athletes in college sports
item.description: NCAA President Charlie Baker told a Senate panel that there are fewer than 10 transgender athletes he is aware of who currently compete in college sports, pouring cold water on an issue Republicans have said is a nationwide problem and one that is increasingly fraught territory for Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, WGN 9

item.title: Government funding deal opens door to move Washington Commanders stadium to DC
item.description: The Washington Commanders could soon be kicking off in the heart of the nation’s capital. The government funding deal unveiled by congressional negotiators Tuesday paved the way for moving the Commanders' stadium from Maryland to Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: Guentzel scores in 7 consecutive games, 1 shy of matching the franchise record in Tuesday's win against Blue Jackets
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Nick Paul had a goal and two assists to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to a 5-3 victory over the Columbus Blue Jackets. Jake Guentzel, Luke Glendening, Brayden Point and Mitchell Chaffee also scored for Tampa Bay, which has won five of six. Andrei Vasilevskiy finished with 28 saves.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: College hockey player sued by opponent over injury she suffered on the ice
item.description: A Michigan State University hockey player has been sued by a former opponent for injuries she suffered on the ice.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Cubs trade Cody Bellinger to New York Yankees
item.description: The Chicago Cubs have traded Cody Bellinger and cash to the New York Yankees in exchange for Cody Poteet, after Bellinger won a Silver Slugger award with the North Siders in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox announce list of players to attend SoxFest 2025
item.description: The Chicago White Sox have announced a list of seven players and eight prospects who will join fans at SoxFest 2025, which is making its return after a four-year hiatus, featuring new fan experiences and a "State of the White Sox" address with Manager Will Venable and front office leadership.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Soccer: Our Lady of Peace 6, Patrick Henry 3
item.description: Holiday Jubilee tournament in girls soccer OLP facing off against Patrick Henry. OLP took home the 6-3 victory.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: LAFC, LA Galaxy to join 18 other pro soccer teams for preseason event in Southern California
item.description: Both of L.A.’s professional men’s soccer clubs will join 18 other teams – including six women’s teams – for the 2025 Coachella Valley Invitational. Preseason matches at the Empire Polo Club in Indio begin on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Rays call for more money after Pinellas commissioners vote in favor of bonds for new stadium
item.description: Pinellas County commissioners voted in favor of approving bonds for the new Tampa Bay Rays stadium Tuesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC
